jd_analysis_result.summary: The Assistant in Nursing provides support to the Nursing staff in the delivery of basic care in a busy surgical department at McQuoin Ward, The Mater Hospital. This role is ideal for those enrolled in nursing programs and offers experience that could assist in securing a New Graduate Position in the future.

skill_evidence.nursing: Enrolled in and undertaking a Bachelor of Nursing at 2nd year level.
skill_evidence.flexibility: Flexible and available to work on a 24/7 rotating roster.
skill_evidence.acute healthcare: Previous experience working in an acute healthcare area (desired).
skill_evidence.fundamental clinical skills: Complete fundamental clinical skills, to assist the RN/EN workforce.

responsibilities: provide support to the Nursing staff in the delivery of basic care
integrate into the nursing and multidisciplinary team
assist the RN/EN workforce with fundamental clinical skills
